current_phase: project-state documentation pack in progress after ACP RDF projection hardening

last_completed_milestone.title: ACP RDF Projection Hardening
last_completed_milestone.summary: Hardened the custom ACP RDF projection diagnostics, report metadata, and non-writing diff mode without changing its authority level.

recommended_next_milestone.title: ACP Decision Lifecycle Workflow
recommended_next_milestone.purpose: Add safe lifecycle governance for decision candidates, including accepted/deferred/rejected/superseded transitions, authority checks, proof-gate checks, blocked-action enforcement, source-anchor safety, and non-claim preservation.

authoritative: GSD requirements, decisions, plans, summaries, validations, and handoff artifacts
runtime proof artifacts where a claim requires runtime evidence
real-document evidence where a claim requires legal-source evidence
derived_non_authoritative: architecture graph reports and generated views
project-state JSON summaries and Mermaid diagrams
source_of_truth_policy.rule: If this JSON conflicts with PRD, GSD, ADR, source, test, runtime, or real-document evidence, the authoritative evidence wins and this JSON must be corrected.
